name: Five Iron Golf
address: 675 W Peachtree St NE Suite 209, Atlanta, GA 30308
about: Five Iron Golf Atlanta Midtown is an indoor golf simulator venue combining golf technology with a sports bar atmosphere. The facility features multiple simulator bays equipped with Trackman launch monitors, high-speed cameras, and access to over 200 virtual courses including PGA Tour venues. Members enjoy free daily play, while non-members can book hourly simulator rentals. The venue offers a full-service bar, chef-inspired menu, and hosts corporate events, leagues, and social gatherings. Located near Tech Square and Fox Theatre, it caters to both serious golfers and those seeking entertainment.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art Trackman technology provides accurate ball and swing data
Access to over 200 virtual courses including Pebble Beach and other PGA Tour venues
Full-service bar and food menu available during play
Membership program includes free daily play and discounts on services
Private event hosting with multisport simulator capabilities

simulator_hardware.notes: Dual-radar technology with hyper-accurate Doppler radar and high-speed camera swing analysis

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue provides rental clubs if needed, though you are welcome to bring your own equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not permitted as the venue has a full-service kitchen and bar available for guests.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: 18 holes typically take 2-3 hours depending on group size and pace, with 90-minute standard simulator rentals available.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Five Iron Golf offers kids' parties, junior clinics, and welcomes families, though adult supervision is required for minors.
